name: Telegram
description: Telegram connector for bot chats, groups, channels, and topic-based conversations through BotFather tokens or an Eliza Cloud webhook gateway.

TELEGRAM_API_ROOT.label: Api Root
TELEGRAM_API_ROOT.help: Base URL for Telegram Bot API used by the TelegramService, allowing override of the default API endpoint.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.label: Bot Token
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.help: Telegram bot token used for authenticating and operating the Telegram bot.

TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHATS.label: Allowed Chats
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHATS.help: JSON-encoded array of Telegram chat IDs that are authorized to interact with the bot.

TELEGRAM_TEST_CHAT_ID.label: Test Chat Id
TELEGRAM_TEST_CHAT_ID.help: Telegram chat ID used by the test suite to send, receive, and validate messages during Telegram bot tests.

modeToggle.enabledHelp: Bot will respond in any chat
modeToggle.disabledHelp: Bot will only respond in listed chat IDs
